excluded_services.reason: not mounted by the deployed brain-prod api service

enforcement_model.authentication: Fastify authPlugin enforces bearer authentication for non-skipAuth routes. API keys authenticate at the same gateway hook only when BRAIN_API_KEY_AUTH_ENABLED=true.
enforcement_model.scope_enforcement: Scopes are checked inside route handlers with requireScope. There is no central gateway route-to-scope matrix in HEAD.

enforcement_modes.public_skip_auth: Route sets skipAuth=true and requires no bearer token.
enforcement_modes.shared_secret_header: Route sets skipAuth=true but checks an operator or platform secret header in the handler.
enforcement_modes.hmac_provider_signed: Route sets skipAuth=true and verifies provider signatures in the handler.
enforcement_modes.route_scope_check_enforced: Route requires bearer auth and calls requireScope before work.
enforcement_modes.auth_only_no_scope_check: Route requires bearer auth but has no scope check in HEAD.
enforcement_modes.conditional_dependency: Route is registered only when an optional dependency is wired.

api_key_scope_access.note: API-key management routes and API-key gateway authentication remain behind BRAIN_API_KEY_AUTH_ENABLED in code. Staging enables the flag, but this artifact marks those routes as feature-gated rather than stable.

endpoints.request_shape: path { orgId }; body { company_name?, founder: { email, display_name? }, founder_external_ref }
multipart { source_type, file } or json { source_type, url } plus optional envelope fields
raw provider webhook body; provider is plaid or stripe in HEAD
endpoints.response_shape: 200 or 202 provider ingest result; 501 for unsupported providers or unconfigured Stripe
200 { raw_id, sha256, signed_url, expires_at, mime_type, bytes }

endpoints.request_shape: query filters plus limit and cursor
query { q?, type?, verified_status?, limit?, cursor? }
path { counterparty_id }; body manual counterparty patch
query { status?, type?, due_before?, limit?, cursor? }
query { kind?, q?, semantic?, since?, until?, limit?, cursor? }
path { tenant_id } must match principal tenant
query filters plus limit and cursor
payment intent create body or { type: pay_invoice, invoice_id } shortcut
{ agent_id, role, display_name, scope_hash?, onchain_address?, registered_tx? }

endpoints.response_shape: 200 published anchor; route absent when broadcaster is not wired

endpoints.request_shape: path { id } must equal principal tenant

feature_gated_or_not_stable.runtime_status: not registered unless flag true; staging enables this today

drift.detail: Brain_API_Specification.yaml line 5201 has an inline description containing https:// without quoting. Repo Redocly tolerates this, but Ruby Psych rejects it.
Registered only when audit broadcaster is wired.
